summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Spanish barcode scanner app with Google authentication. Backend APIs all working correctly, frontend UI properly implemented with brown color scheme, authentication flows functional.

ui_bugs.issue: Counter may not update immediately on page reload after API calls - requires refresh to sync with backend state

passed_tests: ✅ All backend API endpoints (7/7 tests passed)
✅ Google OAuth authentication flow with Emergent Auth
✅ Login page with correct brown color scheme (#5f2e0a)
✅ Scanner page loads with proper Spanish text
✅ CSV file generation in correct format (timestamp,codigo,usuario)
✅ CSV files created in /app/data with proper naming (barras_YYYYMMDD_v{n}.csv)
✅ Finalize modal with proper validation (shows warning for 0 barcodes)
✅ All required data-testid attributes present for testing
✅ Brown color palette correctly implemented throughout UI
✅ Responsive design and proper Spanish localization
